selections.name: Pain Au Chocolat
selections.reason: Top overall rating in this field. The wide draw is not a severe penalty on the outer 1600m track due to the long run-up.

selections.name: Rhein Stryker
selections.reason: Tied for the top rating, possesses the stamina required for the deep sand and can utilize the long 386m homestretch.

selections.name: Bukkowasu
selections.reason: Solid speed figures and fits the profile of a closer who can swoop late on the outer track.

selections.name: Blanton Arrow
selections.reason: Competitive class ratings and should get a fair trip from the middle of the gate.

danger_horse.name: Aztlan
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form and capable of hitting the board if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Florida Fountain
selections.reason: Highest overall rating in the field. Shows good tactical speed for the sprint distance.

selections.name: Star Of Uno
selections.reason: Strong speed figures and gets the rail draw, which is highly advantageous on the inner track.

selections.name: It's Bad
selections.reason: Inside draw will allow for a ground-saving trip. Has the class to contend.

selections.name: Anela Kaikamahine
selections.reason: Consistent performer with solid class ratings. Can stalk the pace and finish strong.

danger_horse.name: Hana Hiraku
danger_horse.reason: Draws well inside and could surprise if the top picks duel early.

selections.name: Sean Barows
selections.reason: Massive class and speed advantage over this field. Should dominate the 1600m distance.

selections.name: Liberty
selections.reason: Best of the rest. Solid figures that put her clearly in second position.

selections.name: Suzuno Al Rimal
selections.reason: Good class rating and can handle the deep sand. Should be running on late.

selections.name: Self Ace
selections.reason: Inside draw and decent form make him a logical inclusion for the lower exotics.

selections.name: Gold Phoenix
selections.reason: Clear top rating. Has the tactical speed to overcome the outside draw in this 1400m sprint.

selections.name: Puna
selections.reason: Strong class figures and draws well enough to get a good stalking position.

selections.name: Kannon Pyonta
selections.reason: Tied for second-highest rating. Will need a good trip from the outside but has the ability.

selections.name: Clematis Noble
selections.reason: Gets a massive upgrade due to the inside barrier (1-4) advantage on the 1400m inner track.

danger_horse.name: Canterbury Time
danger_horse.reason: Solid class rating and can factor into the exotics with a clean break.

selections.name: Samani Denka
selections.reason: Top overall rating. Has the speed to contend and the stamina to finish in the deep sand.

selections.name: Straight Beam
selections.reason: Very strong speed figures. Will be a major threat if he can handle the surface.

selections.name: Dore Venus
selections.reason: Consistent form and fits well within this class level.

selections.name: Sweet Bomb
selections.reason: Solid ratings across the board. Can hit the board at a decent price.

danger_horse.name: Golden Rutile
danger_horse.reason: Good class rating, could surprise if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Decided
selections.reason: Tied for top rating in a very wide-open race. Has the stamina for the 1600m outer track.

selections.name: Nobishiro
selections.reason: Equally rated with the top pick. Should get a fair trip from the middle.

selections.name: Eros
selections.reason: Outside draw is fine here. Good class figures make him a contender.

selections.name: M T King
selections.reason: Solid inside draw, can save ground before the long homestretch.

danger_horse.name: Colorado Fountain
danger_horse.reason: Not far behind the top group and could easily factor in the finish.

selections.name: Drive Me Home
selections.reason: Top rating and gets the critical inside barrier (1-4) advantage on the 1400m inner track.

selections.name: Kitasan Yuja
selections.reason: Tied for top rating. Will need to overcome the outside draw but has the raw ability.

selections.name: Token Renan
selections.reason: Elite class figures. A major threat if he can secure a good position early.

selections.name: Hecto Princess
selections.reason: Another with top-tier ratings in a top-heavy race. Must be respected.

danger_horse.name: Barrel
danger_horse.reason: Just a point behind the top four and can easily upset.

selections.name: Avantgarde
selections.reason: Clear top rating. Draws perfectly on the inside for this sprint.

selections.name: S K Eagle
selections.reason: Strong inside draw and solid figures make him the primary danger.

selections.name: Asian Gold
selections.reason: Good class rating and can stalk the pace effectively.

selections.name: Takano Dream
selections.reason: Consistent form and fits well into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Caramia
danger_horse.reason: Wide draw is tough, but has the class to overcome it if the pace is fast.

selections.name: Justin Long
selections.reason: Massive advantage in a grueling 2400m deep sand test. Has the proven stamina and class.

selections.name: Guliston
selections.reason: Best of the rest. Should be grinding away late when others tire.

selections.name: Brest
selections.reason: Solid class figures and draws well to save ground for the long trip.

selections.name: Destin
selections.reason: Has the endurance profile needed to hit the board in this marathon.

danger_horse.name: Mitsukane Mars
danger_horse.reason: Capable of staying the distance and could grab a piece at a price.

selections.name: Lady Melora
selections.reason: Dominant rating. A standout in this field and perfectly suited for the 1600m outer track.

selections.name: Ken Vivaldi
selections.reason: Clear second choice based on figures. Will be closing late.

selections.name: Fair Go
selections.reason: Strong class rating and should get a clean trip from the middle.

selections.name: Valtari
selections.reason: Inside draw helps. Has the ability to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Meisho Tabizuki
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and solid figures make him a dangerous exotic inclusion.

selections.name: Bonanza
selections.reason: Elite class figures. The outside draw is a slight negative on the 1400m, but his raw ability overcomes it.

selections.name: Dixie Gunner
selections.reason: Very strong contender with excellent speed figures.

selections.name: Bahir Dar
selections.reason: Gets the inside barrier advantage (1-4) which is crucial on this inner track.

selections.name: Satono Tempest
selections.reason: Rail draw is a massive plus. Can save all the ground and strike late.

danger_horse.name: Dream Believer
danger_horse.reason: Another inside runner with elite figures. Cannot be ignored.

selections.name: Wolkenmeer
selections.reason: Top rating. The outside draw is fine for this distance, and he has the stamina to finish strong.

selections.name: Techno Design
selections.reason: Excellent class figures and draws well inside to save ground early.

selections.name: Omega Drive
selections.reason: Solid overall rating and should get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: Tokushi Tigre
selections.reason: Good speed figures and can factor into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Dia No Ace
danger_horse.reason: Tied on ratings with the fourth pick and has shown ability to compete at this level.
